heroSection.heading: EHV Transmission Lines
heroSection.subheading: High-voltage transmission infrastructure for reliable power evacuation

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL executes EHV transmission lines with technical precision, covering design, erection, alignment, stringing, and commissioning. Our solutions ensure grid reliability and efficient power evacuation across industrial and utility corridors.

keyBenefitsSection.title: High Reliability
keyBenefitsSection.description: Engineered structures built for completely uninterrupted power flow.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Expert Engineering
keyBenefitsSection.description: Deployed by specialized teams with decades of terrain and layout planning experience.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Turnkey Delivery
keyBenefitsSection.description: Complete end-to-end EPC execution from conception to synchronized commissioning.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Safety Compliance
keyBenefitsSection.description: Total adherence to rigorous regulatory standards and international safety protocols.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: 220kV+ Transmission Capability
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Supports high-voltage power distribution for robust networks.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Monopole & Lattice Tower
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Precise erection & alignment for diverse terrains.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Route Survey & Alignment
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Optimized corridor planning utilizing advanced topologies.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: High-Voltage Stringing
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Sag calculation & phase spacing for optimal safety.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Quality Inspection & Testing
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Ensures strict compliance & operational reliability.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Grid Integration & Commissioning
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Fully synchronized and ready for operational load.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to Discuss Your Transmission Project?
ctaSection.description: Connect with DPPL's team to discuss turnkey EPC requirements and timeline optimization.

heroSection.heading: Substations & Automation
heroSection.subheading: Turnkey EHV substation EPC with advanced automation and SCADA integration

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL delivers complete substation EPC solutions from 66kV to 400kV, including AIS and GIS switchyards, transformer installation, relay protection, and full automation. Our substation projects integrate SCADA, RTU, and bay-level control systems for remote monitoring and reliable grid operation across Gujarat and beyond.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Turnkey EPC Delivery
keyBenefitsSection.description: Single-point responsibility from civil works through synchronized grid energization.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Advanced Automation
keyBenefitsSection.description: SCADA, relay protection, and remote monitoring for intelligent substation operation.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Grid Stability
keyBenefitsSection.description: Robust voltage transformation and switching infrastructure for uninterrupted power supply.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Utility Compliance
keyBenefitsSection.description: Full adherence to GETCO, CEA, and IEC standards for safe substation commissioning.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: AIS & GIS Switchyards
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Design and erection of air-insulated and gas-insulated substation bays up to 400kV.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Power Transformer Installation
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Transportation, oil filtration, testing, and commissioning of EHV transformers.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Relay & Protection Systems
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Numerical relay configuration, busbar protection, and fault detection logic.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: SCADA & RTU Integration
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Real-time data acquisition, remote control, and alarm management systems.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Civil & Structural Works
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Foundation design, control room construction, cable trenches, and earth matting.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Testing & Commissioning
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Pre-commissioning tests, energization, and utility handover documentation.

ctaSection.heading: Planning a New Substation Project?
ctaSection.description: Speak with DPPL's substation specialists about EPC scope, automation requirements, and project timelines.

heroSection.heading: XLPE Underground Cable Laying
heroSection.subheading: Precision underground EHV cable networks for urban and industrial corridors

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL specializes in XLPE underground cable laying for 11kV to 220kV networks. Our scope covers route survey, trenching, duct laying, cable pulling, jointing, termination, and testing. We execute trefoil and flat formation laying with sand bedding and warning tape as per IS and utility specifications for safe, long-life underground power distribution.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Minimal Transmission Loss
keyBenefitsSection.description: XLPE insulation delivers low dielectric loss and superior thermal performance.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Urban-Ready Execution
keyBenefitsSection.description: Efficient trenching and cable routing in dense industrial and municipal areas.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Expert Jointing
keyBenefitsSection.description: Heat-shrink and cold-shrink terminations by certified cable jointing teams.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Quality Assurance
keyBenefitsSection.description: Hi-pot testing, IR measurement, and VLF testing before energization.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Route Survey & Planning
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Utility mapping, soil assessment, and optimized cable corridor design.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Trenching & Duct Laying
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Mechanized road cutting, trench preparation, and HDPE duct installation.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Cable Pulling & Laying
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Trefoil and flat formation laying with rollers, winches, and tension control.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Jointing & Termination
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Indoor and outdoor terminations with stress control and sealing kits.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Cable Testing
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Insulation resistance, partial discharge, and high-voltage withstand tests.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Restoration & Handover
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Road reinstatement, as-built drawings, and utility clearance documentation.

ctaSection.heading: Need Underground Cable Infrastructure?
ctaSection.description: Connect with DPPL for XLPE cable route planning, laying, and commissioning support.

heroSection.heading: Industrial Power Distribution
heroSection.subheading: HT/LT power distribution systems engineered for industrial complexes

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL designs and executes industrial power distribution networks including HT receiving stations, ring main units, LT panels, bus ducting, and internal cabling. We serve manufacturing plants, SEZs, and industrial estates with reliable HT/LT infrastructure that meets load growth, safety, and operational continuity requirements.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Load-Optimized Design
keyBenefitsSection.description: Distribution layouts sized for current demand with provision for future expansion.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Uninterrupted Supply
keyBenefitsSection.description: Redundant feeders and switchgear for critical industrial process continuity.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Safety Standards
keyBenefitsSection.description: Compliance with IE rules, factory act requirements, and electrical safety norms.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Integrated Delivery
keyBenefitsSection.description: End-to-end supply, erection, testing, and commissioning of distribution assets.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: HT Receiving Stations
technicalFeaturesSection.description: 33kV/11kV HT panels, VCB, CT/PT, and metering for industrial intake points.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: LT Panel & Bus Duct
technicalFeaturesSection.description: PCC, MCC, APFC panels, and bus duct routing for shop-floor distribution.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Ring Main Units
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Compact RMUs for reliable HT ring network operation in industrial zones.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Internal Cabling
technicalFeaturesSection.description: HT/LT cable routing, tray work, and termination within plant boundaries.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Power Factor Correction
technicalFeaturesSection.description: APFC panel design and installation for optimal power quality and tariff savings.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Testing & Handover
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Primary injection, relay testing, and load trial before operational handover.

ctaSection.heading: Powering Your Industrial Facility?
ctaSection.description: Discuss HT/LT distribution requirements with DPPL's industrial power specialists.

heroSection.heading: EPC Turnkey Execution
heroSection.subheading: End-to-end engineering, procurement, and construction for power infrastructure

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL provides complete EPC turnkey execution for power transmission and distribution projects. As a GETCO/DGVCL approved vendor, we manage engineering design, material procurement, construction, quality control, and commissioning under a single contract — delivering projects on schedule with full accountability from concept to grid synchronization.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Single-Point Accountability
keyBenefitsSection.description: One EPC contractor responsible for design, supply, execution, and commissioning.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Approved Vendor Status
keyBenefitsSection.description: Recognized EPC capability with GETCO, DGVCL, and government utility frameworks.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Schedule Certainty
keyBenefitsSection.description: Integrated project planning with milestone tracking and resource optimization.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Cost Control
keyBenefitsSection.description: Consolidated procurement and execution for predictable project economics.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Engineering & Design
technicalFeaturesSection.description: SLD preparation, BOQ, structural design, and detailed project reporting.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Procurement Management
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Vendor evaluation, material sourcing, inspection, and logistics coordination.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Construction Management
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Site mobilization, workforce deployment, and progress monitoring.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Quality Assurance
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Stage-wise inspection, test protocols, and documentation as per utility norms.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: HSE Management
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Safety planning, toolbox talks, PPE compliance, and incident prevention.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Commissioning & Handover
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Testing, energization, as-built submission, and defect liability support.

ctaSection.heading: Looking for a Turnkey EPC Partner?
ctaSection.description: Partner with DPPL for end-to-end power infrastructure delivery with full project accountability.

heroSection.heading: Regulatory Liaisoning
heroSection.subheading: Government approvals and utility compliance for seamless project execution

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL manages regulatory liaisoning and utility coordination for power infrastructure projects across Gujarat. We handle approvals from GETCO, DGVCL, PGVCL, MGVCL, and relevant government departments — including load sanction, wayleave permissions, safety clearances, and energization approvals to keep projects moving without regulatory delays.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Faster Clearances
keyBenefitsSection.description: Established relationships with DISCOMs and state utility bodies for expedited approvals.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Documentation Expertise
keyBenefitsSection.description: Complete preparation of technical submissions, drawings, and compliance reports.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Multi-Utility Coverage
keyBenefitsSection.description: Liaisoning across GETCO, DGVCL, PGVCL, and MGVCL jurisdictions.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Compliance Assurance
keyBenefitsSection.description: Adherence to CEA regulations, IE rules, and state electricity board requirements.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Load Sanction & Connectivity
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Application processing for new load connections and grid connectivity approvals.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Wayleave & ROW Permissions
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Right-of-way approvals for transmission corridors and cable routes.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Safety Clearances
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Electrical inspector approvals and safety certification documentation.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Utility Coordination
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Joint site surveys, material inspection, and stage-wise utility sign-offs.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Government Liaisoning
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Coordination with GIDC, municipal bodies, and forest/land authorities.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Energization Approvals
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Final testing clearance and grid energization permission from DISCOM.

ctaSection.heading: Need Regulatory Support for Your Project?
ctaSection.description: Let DPPL handle utility approvals and compliance so your project stays on track.

heroSection.heading: Renewables & BESS
heroSection.subheading: Solar EPC and battery energy storage for sustainable power infrastructure

overviewSection.title: Overview
overviewSection.description: DPPL extends its EPC expertise to renewable energy with solar power plant execution and Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) integration. We deliver grid-connected solar installations, pooling substations for wind and solar farms, and BESS solutions that enhance grid stability, enable peak shaving, and support India's clean energy transition.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Clean Energy Integration
keyBenefitsSection.description: Grid-connected solar and BESS solutions aligned with India's renewable targets.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Grid Stability
keyBenefitsSection.description: BESS systems for frequency regulation, peak load management, and backup power.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Turnkey Solar EPC
keyBenefitsSection.description: Complete solar plant execution from site preparation to grid synchronization.

keyBenefitsSection.title: Future-Ready Infrastructure
keyBenefitsSection.description: Scalable designs supporting hybrid renewable and storage deployments.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Solar EPC Execution
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Ground-mount and rooftop solar installation with inverter and monitoring systems.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: BESS Integration
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Lithium-ion battery storage with PCS, EMS, and grid interconnection.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Pooling Substations
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Dedicated substations for wind and solar farm grid connectivity.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Power Evacuation
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Transmission lines and cable networks for renewable power delivery.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: SCADA & Monitoring
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Real-time generation tracking, performance analytics, and remote diagnostics.

technicalFeaturesSection.title: Commissioning & O&M Support
technicalFeaturesSection.description: Grid synchronization, performance testing, and operational handover.
